name: MABOS - Multi-Agent Business Operating System
description: BDI cognitive architecture with ontology-based reasoning, case-based learning, and multi-business management for OpenClaw
author: Kingler Bercy

cbrMaxCases.description: Maximum cases per business before pruning

temporalModelEnabled.description: Enable three-date temporal model for memory items (observed_at, referenced_dates)

observerEnabled.description: Enable Observer compression pipeline for conversation context

observerMode.description: Observer mode: heuristic (zero API cost), llm (always refine), hybrid (heuristic first, LLM when quality threshold not met)

observerTokenThreshold.description: Token threshold before observer triggers compression

reflectorEnabled.description: Enable Reflector GC pipeline for observation log

reflectorTokenThreshold.description: Token threshold before reflector triggers observation pruning

cacheAwareLayoutEnabled.description: Enable prompt-cache-aware context layout (splits into stable systemPrompt + dynamic prependContext). Opt-in as it relies on core systemPrompt hook fix.

cognitiveContextEnabled.description: Inject BDI cognitive state summaries into agent context

financialToolGuardEnabled.description: Block financial tools exceeding stakeholder approval threshold

llmMetricsEnabled.description: Log LLM token usage metrics to metrics/llm-usage.jsonl

preCompactionObserverEnabled.description: Run observer on messages before compaction to preserve observations

autoRecallEnabled.description: Auto-recall relevant memory at session start based on user prompt

directiveRoutingEnabled.description: Enable directive classification and routing suggestion for CEO

inboxContextEnabled.description: Inject unread inbox summary into agent context
